name: Iced Ambrosia Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Sift in flour mixture alternately with milk or water, mixing just until combined.
5. Stir in raisins, candied fruits, dates, walnuts, cinnamon, cloves, baking powder, and salt.
6. Drop by spoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Allow to cool on wire racks before serving.
